title: Add old-bridge guest anomaly rule
summary: Add core.anomaly.old_bridge_guest.v1 using logistics, bridge route, prepared item, obligation, faction and season basis facts.
acceptance: Old-bridge guest crisis state is an explicit serializable owner store with bridge window prepared-item basis route basis resolution and terminal reason fields
Activation and safe-passage checks use existing logistics route item obligation Chronicle and faction basis facts without owning those source facts
Low-risk evidence includes bridge ledgers missing prepared goods route delays merchant testimony and old-family oral records
Resolution supports non-combat reciprocity rerouting or obligation settlement and writes structured review rows
Focused tests cover prepared-item validation stale route/content basis rejection terminal cleanup cap hits and no full logistics scan

history.details: Created by WM-0072 M5 planning DAG; remains proposed until dependencies are done.

objective: Implement the old-bridge guest anomaly as a reusable road/logistics rule without duplicating logistics or obligation authority.
forbiddenPaths: broad faction governance or season event implementation
risksAndFileOwnership: Risk: bridge anomaly duplicates item or route authority; existing owner stores must remain source truth.
Risk: faction pressure enters before owner facts exist; use placeholders only as versioned basis rows or block for WM-0077.
Risk: route/prepared-item checks become global scans; use bounded indexed candidates.
benchmarkImpact: Adds old-bridge candidate route/prepared-item and terminal reason metrics; baseline update waits for WM-0083.
reviewRouting: Simulation-engineer completes to reviewer; systems-architect must be consulted before changing logistics ownership or public schema.
rollbackModel: Revert old-bridge owner store, tests, content def and docs; keep prior M5 anomaly roster and third-knock work intact.
ownerGate: Do not duplicate logistics item route or obligation authority
Validate bridge window and prepared-item basis before mutation
Use bounded candidates and stable ordering
Block on public protocol save schema dependency UI authority or M6 scope

sparkEligibility.reason: New anomaly/logistics integration touches deterministic simulation ownership.
